message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: remove temperature modulation, add deterministic cache salt in grounded_proposer.py only.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Both our features touch grounded_proposer.py (weighted tip selection for me). Since it's the only file in scope, let's each work on non-overlapping regions: I will add tip_weights param to GroundedProposer.__init__, a new _select_tip_with_weights() helper method, and modify only the set_tip_randomly branch (lines ~360-369) that selects the tip. Please tell me what region/lines your feature touches so we avoid conflicts, or propose an ordering (e.g. you go first, I rebase my diff on top).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Accepted - same file, disjoint regions. I will only touch: GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding tip_weights param), the set_tip_randomly tip-selection block (~lines 360-370), and a new _select_tip_with_weights() helper method I'll add near TIPS usage. I will NOT touch the temperature/epsilon/cache-salt code (~lines 417-435) - that's yours. Good luck!

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Agreed. I will touch only: (1) DescribeProgram class ~L28-45, (2) DescribeModule class ~L48-72, (3) GenerateSingleModuleInstruction inside generate_instruction_class ~L75-132, (4) GenerateModuleInstruction.forward signature/body ~L166-267 (adding cache_salt param + passing to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls), (5) propose_instruction_for_predictor ~L388-442 (remove temperature modulation, compute+pass cache_salt). I will add a NEW private method _cache_salt at the very END of the file (after line 442, after propose_instruction_for_predictor), so it won't collide with your __init__ (L272-324) or propose_instructions_for_program (L326-386) edits, including your tip-selection lines ~360-369. I will NOT touch GroundedProposer.__init__ or propose_instructions_for_program at all. Go ahead with your plan; this looks disjoint from mine.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Finished: added tip_weights param to __init__, _select_tip_with_weights() helper, and wired it into the set_tip_randomly branch. Only touched __init__ and lines around the tip-selection call - did not touch temperature/epsilon/cache-salt code or propose_instruction_for_predictor. All yours from here.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Finished: removed temperature/epsilon modulation, added _cache_salt() helper, added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, wired cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward and propose_instruction_for_predictor. Did not touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program/tip-selection code. Tests in tests/propose/ pass.
